# Race Driver: Grid

name: Grid Race Driver: Memory Infinite Flashback
mode: once
w16 715BA2D6 0000

name: Grid Race Driver: ASM Infinite Flashback
mode: once
w32 004BB080 39290000

name: Grid Race Driver: Memory Lots Of Money After One Race
mode: once
w32 30078D88 00002904
w32 32B74FE8 00002904
w32 505EBAB0 00002904
w32 55ED55E4 00002904
w32 57F1CA74 00002904
w32 5826FFE4 00002904
w32 712C50BC 00002904
w32 712C50C0 00002904
w32 72293CF4 00002904
w32 72296BD4 00002904

name: Grid Race Driver: Memory Always First
mode: once
w32 32514528 00000002
w32 326C99A8 00000002
w32 326C99AC 00000002
w32 326C99B0 00000002
w32 6DCCEBB4 00000002
w32 6DCD4FD0 00000002
w32 700BB33C 00000002
w32 700BB344 00000002
w32 700BB434 00000002
w32 700BB43C 00000002

name: Grid Race Driver: ASM Always First
mode: once
w32 008CFA70 60000000
w32 008CFA90 60000000
w32 008CFA9C 60000000
w32 008CFAB0 60000000
w32 008CFAD0 60000000
w32 008CFADC 60000000
w32 008CFAE0 60000000
w32 008CFAF0 60000000
w32 008CFB00 91E30008
w32 008CFB04 60000000

name: Memory Infinite Flashback
mode: once
w16 715BA2D6 0000

name: ASM Infinite Flashback
mode: once
w32 004BB080 39290000

name: Memory Lots Of Money After One Race
mode: once
w32 30078D88 00002904
w32 32B74FE8 00002904
w32 505EBAB0 00002904
w32 55ED55E4 00002904
w32 57F1CA74 00002904
w32 5826FFE4 00002904
w32 712C50BC 00002904
w32 712C50C0 00002904
w32 72293CF4 00002904
w32 72296BD4 00002904

name: Memory Always First
mode: once
w32 32514528 00000002
w32 326C99A8 00000002
w32 326C99AC 00000002
w32 326C99B0 00000002
w32 6DCCEBB4 00000002
w32 6DCD4FD0 00000002
w32 700BB33C 00000002
w32 700BB344 00000002
w32 700BB434 00000002
w32 700BB43C 00000002

name: ASM Always First
mode: once
w32 008CFA70 60000000
w32 008CFA90 60000000
w32 008CFA9C 60000000
w32 008CFAB0 60000000
w32 008CFAD0 60000000
w32 008CFADC 60000000
w32 008CFAE0 60000000
w32 008CFAF0 60000000
w32 008CFB00 91E30008
w32 008CFB04 60000000
